title: GetOprMode VI
description:
Reads the Epson RC+ 8.0 mode of operation.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.

Mode	ID	Description

Auto	1	Epson RC+ 8.0 is in auto mode.

Program	2	Epson RC+ 8.0 is in program
				 mode.

Epson RC+ 8.0 is in program
				 mode.
notes: When Operation Mode is set to Program, the Epson RC+ 8.0 GUI for the associated server process is opened and the Controller operation mode is set to Program.  If the user closes the RC+ GUI, Operation Mode is set to Auto.  If Operation Mode is set to Auto, the RC+ GUI also closes.
